cookie.title: Cookies & Privacy
cookie.text: We use cookies to improve your experience. In accordance with GDPR, your consent is required.

services_page.seo_title: Our Services — VIP Protection, Escort, Event Security
services_page.seo_desc: Discover all our protection services: VIP bodyguard, secure escort, event security, surveillance, international protection. Elite agents available 24/7.
services_page.title: Protection Services
services_page.subtitle: A complete range of security solutions tailored to your needs, provided by elite professionals.
services_page.cta_subtitle: Every situation is unique. Contact us for a tailored assessment.

items.title: VIP Protection
items.desc: Dedicated bodyguard service for celebrities, corporate executives, artists and public figures. Our agents ensure your security 24/7 with absolute discretion.

items.title: Secure Escort
items.desc: Secure travel with armored vehicles and drivers trained in anti-aggression techniques and exceptional driving.

items.title: Event Security
items.desc: Complete security management for your private events, VIP parties, seminars and conferences.

items.title: Surveillance & Reconnaissance
items.desc: Surveillance and intelligence missions to identify and neutralize potential threats before they materialize.

items.title: International Protection
items.desc: Secure accompaniment during your international travel, with coordination of local teams.

items.title: Rapid Response
items.desc: Response teams available in less than 15 minutes in Paris and the Île-de-France region.

faqs.q: How far in advance do I need to book?
faqs.r: We recommend a minimum of 48 hours for standard missions. For international or event missions, plan 1 week ahead. In emergencies, our line is available 24/7.
This depends on the assessed threat level and local regulations. All our agents are trained in close protection techniques, with or without weapons depending on needs and authorizations.
Yes, we operate in 12 countries. Each international mission is subject to prior geopolitical analysis and coordination with certified local partners.
Each agent signs a strict non-disclosure agreement. Our communication systems are encrypted. No client information is shared without explicit consent.
Our rates are established by quote based on the mission, number of agents, duration and threat level. Contact us for a free confidential consultation.

about_page.seo_desc: Founded by former special forces members, Turbo Sécurity is the reference in close protection in France.
about_page.gallery_confidential: Photos available on request — client confidentiality respected
about_page.cta_subtitle: Contact our team for a confidential consultation.

timeline.event: Founding of Turbo Sécurity in Paris
Creation of the rapid intervention unit
Opening of the internal training center

values.title: Discretion
values.desc: Client confidentiality is sacred. Every agent signs a strict non-disclosure agreement.

values.title: Excellence
values.desc: We only recruit professionals from special forces and intelligence services.

values.title: Team
values.desc: A tight-knit team, trained together, capable of rapidly coordinating in crisis situations.

values.title: Precision
values.desc: Every mission is planned rigorously. Nothing is left to chance in our preparation.

contact_page.seo_desc: Contact Turbo Sécurity for any close protection request. Our team is available 24/7.
contact_page.urgent: For urgent requests, we recommend calling us directly. Our operators are available 24/7.
contact_page.success_sub: We will get back to you as soon as possible.

reservation_page.seo_desc: Book your close protection with Turbo Sécurity. Confidential and secure form. Response within 2 hours.
reservation_page.title: Book Protection
reservation_page.subtitle: Fill out this confidential form. Our team will contact you within 2 hours.
reservation_page.success_sub: Your request has been received. Our team will contact you shortly to confirm your reservation.

tracking_page.title: Your reservation
tracking_page.subtitle: Enter the email address used during your reservation to check its status.
tracking_page.not_found: No reservation found for this email.

home_page.why_title:
Excellence in the service
of your security
why_items: Certified agents trained in the best techniques
Security protocols adapted to each situation
Teams available throughout France and internationally
